title: cyclosorus hispidifolius
intro: Cyclosorus hispidifolius, also known as the prickly fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus hispidifolius include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, and its leaves can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
